description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade is dominated by large, symmetrical windows with white framing and a central glass door, opening onto a spacious wooden deck furnished with outdoor seating and a table. The left side reveals a partially enclosed balcony with white railings and a rooftop terrace, while the right side includes a landscaped garden area with decorative rocks and a small tree. The rear of the bungalow is clad in horizontal light wood siding, with a prominent bay window and additional balcony space. The roof is mostly flat, with some sections slightly elevated to accommodate the upper terrace and balcony. The overall structure is compact yet visually dynamic, blending contemporary elements with functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of dark and light finishes, large symmetrical windows, a central deck, and multiple balconies and terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, central deck with seating, and landscaped garden to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden siding, rooftop terrace, and landscaped garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wood siding, bay window, and upper balcony with railing.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the enclosed balcony, steps leading to the deck, and a glimpse of the front entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with bay and grouped side windows
